title: Starweb
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Starweb''''' was a disk-shaped [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned and operated by [[Asyr Sei'lar]] after she resigned from duty with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It had been loaned to her by [[Booster Terrik]].

Under a new identity, Sei'lar used the ''Starweb'' to reach her homeworld of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], where she hoped to influence change in [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] society. She left the ship at [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] for Terrik to retrieve.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
